channel.title: Real-Time on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Real-Time on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Recommendation Systems (15): Real-Time Recommendation and Online Learning
item.description: A user opens your app at 14:02 and searches for “trail running shoes”. By 15:30 they have moved on and are reading kitchen reviews. A model that retrains nightly is still showing them Salomon ads at 16:00 — and that gap is exactly the bug a real-time system fixes. The interesting part is not “make it faster” but “what should be fast” — most features add nothing to AUC even when made real-time, and the wrong design point burns money for no lift.
